pages.text: Two add-ons widen your $(bold)boiler and burner$() options:$(br)$(li)$(italic)Create: Blaze Burner Fuels$() — new items and recipes that serve as alternative fuels and easier steam-boiler setups.$(li)$(italic)More Create Burners$() — additional burner blocks as alternatives to the Blaze Burner.$(br2)Both matter most when you scale to steam power and want fuel you can source locally.
pages.title: Fuels & Burners
